notes: Dual-lists Phylloporus gilled boletes under both Gilled and Spongelike/Boletes so they are discoverable from either mushroom-form route, not search-only.
Adds source-backed field measurements for Phylloporus rhodoxanthus, including cap and stem size ranges.
Adds matching field measurements and clearer card/detail size notes for Phylloporus leucomycelinus.
Keeps the records food-valid but caution-framed; no source-clearing or image changes were made.
